achievements.description: Let the cat heal your wounds

achievements.description: And having explored all of the castle rooms, his son took a short nap... (1890 rooms required no more no less!!!)

achievements.title: Blazing Blood
achievements.description: Activate the Belmont secret technique

achievements.title: Vampire Killer
achievements.description: Defeat Dracula in the prologue without taking any damage (no heart usage)
achievements.author: MrGauss

achievements.title: Castle of Rage
achievements.description: Defeat Gaibon and Slogra damageless without any equipment on both hands (no MP or Heart usage or Talisman)
achievements.author: MrGauss

achievements.title: Rusty Duel
achievements.description: Defeat the Doppleganger10 damageless with the Red Rust (no MP or Heart usage or Talisman)
achievements.author: MrGauss

achievements.title: Dancing Water
achievements.description: Defeat Scylla damageless only equiped with a Jewel knuckles (no MP or Heart usage, Talisman or familiars)
achievements.author: MrGauss

achievements.title: No Longer a Horse, but Still no Griffin
achievements.description: Use all of Richter's physical techniques to damage and defeat Hippogryph (damageless, no whip or heart usage)
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: Cursed Battle
achievements.description: Defeat Karasuman damageless with Tyrfing and Leather shield (no MP or Heart usage, Talisman, dive kick or familiars)
achievements.author: MrGauss

achievements.title: Arena Shenanigans
achievements.description: Defeat Minotaurus and Werewolf with Alucard damageless with Tyrfing and Leather shield (no Hearts, spells or Talisman)
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: Axe Lord vs Vampire Lord
achievements.description: Using the Axe Armor, defeat Olrox taking no more than 3 hits (no Talisman or familiars)
achievements.author: MrGauss

achievements.title: Wolf vs Dog
achievements.description: Defeat Cerberos damageless only using the Soul of Wolf (no Talisman)
achievements.author: MrGauss

achievements.title: Whip! Whip 'em Good!
achievements.description: Defeat Granfaloon with Richter without taking damage (no heart usage)
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: Nightmare Beauty
achievements.description: Defeat Succubus damageless with Tyrfing and Leather shield (no MP or Heart usage, Talisman, dive kick or familiars)
achievements.author: MrGauss

achievements.title: Shaft Floor is Lava
achievements.description: Defeat Shaft's orb damageless without touching the floor after the first hit (divekick only, no familiars, spells, bat form, hearts usage, or talisman)
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: I was Born in Castlevania
achievements.description: Defeat Darkwing Bat with Richter damageless and using only the whip (no heart, uppercut, dash or slide usage)
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: Pride of Michelangelo
achievements.description: Defeat the Medusa damageless with the Nunchaku (no MP or Heart usage, Talisman, dive kick or familiars)
achievements.author: MrGauss

achievements.title: Castle of Rage II
achievements.description: Defeat The Creature damageless without any equipment on both hands (no MP or Heart usage, Talisman or familiars)
achievements.author: MrGauss

achievements.title: Can You Whip a Fly?
achievements.description: Defeat Beezelbub with Richter without taking damage (no heart usage)
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: Axe Lord vs Pharaoh
achievements.description: Using the Axe Armor, defeat Akmodan II damageless (no Talisman or familiars)
achievements.author: MrGauss

achievements.title: Family Matters
achievements.description: Defeat the fake heroes with Richter without taking damage (no heart usage)
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: Death of Death
achievements.description: Defeat Death damageless with Tyrfing and Leather sh. (ATT<=35 and no Axe Lord armor, heart, spells, morph, familiars, Talisman or potions)
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: Was That Really a Boss?
achievements.description: Defeat Galamoth with Alucard equiped with his sword and Leather sh. damageless (no morph, platforms, Talisman or Beryl circlet)
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: In the Name of my Mother
achievements.description: Defeat Dracula with Alucard damageless and barehanded (ATT<=105 and no hearts, morphs, familiar or Talisman)
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: Whipping Darkness
achievements.description: Defeat Shaft with Richter without being damaged more than 3 times (no item crash)
achievements.author: MrGauss

achievements.title: Acrolucard
achievements.description: Break at least 11 candles without touching the ground in Clock Tower's outdoor section (no morph, Power of Sire, spells or high jumps)
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: Blindfolded Maze
achievements.description: Pass through the Catacomb's dark room and turn on the light without being damaged or using Bat Echo or Mist form
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: Wolf Run
achievements.description: In the Entrance, kill 13 enemies in a row using the Power of Wolf without stopping
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: Nice Flight
achievements.description: Wing smash consecutively for 8 seconds (no pausing allowed)
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: Silent, Yet Deadly
achievements.description: Kill 25 enemies in a row without leaving Poison Gas form
achievements.author: tele

achievements.title: Lucky 3's
achievements.description: On Luck Mode, reach the librarian with Kills <=33, Max HP<=33,  Lvl<= 9 and without dying (no Death skip or Cube of Zoe)
achievements.author: Shmelyoff

achievements.title: Rondo of Blood Gaiden
achievements.description: Finish the game as Richter in one session defeating all the bosses and without using save points to refill your health
achievements.author: MrGauss
